name: Application Header
uri: persistent — rendered in App.jsx for all authenticated routes
notes: Header is rendered only when AuthContext.isAuthenticated is true; unauthenticated users are shown LoginForm instead (App.jsx:80-82).
Navigation is click-handler-based with no React Router — clicking a nav item calls the onNavigate callback prop which sets App.state.activeSection; the URL does not change.
Header exposes three nav targets (documents, upload, search); the Sidebar additionally exposes 'tags', which is absent from the Header.
Header is stateless and consumes no Redux store or AuthContext directly — all state is owned by the parent App class component.
